userStories.title: Invite member by email
userStories.description: Admins can invite a member by email; invite creates pending membership and sends email.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite API accepts email and role

userStories.title: Change member role
userStories.description: Admins can change role between viewer, editor, admin.

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access
userStories.description: Admins can revoke access, removing membership and invalidating sessions if applicable.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoke API removes membership or marks revoked

userStories.title: Record membership changes in audit log
userStories.description: Membership invites, role changes, and revokes write an audit entry.

userStories.title: Review recent membership changes UI
userStories.description: Workspace settings page shows recent membership changes with pagination.
acceptanceCriteria: Admins can filter by action and date
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
